# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# ARM template file that creates an Azure Function App along with Managed Identity to access Storage, Key Vault and SQL Server instances 
parameters:
- name: storageAccountNamePrefix # Name of the prefix for your resource names (e.g., 'dev')  
  type: string   
variables:    
  location: "West Europe"     
  functionAppResourceGroup: "${resourceGroupName}"      
  appServicePlan : "FunctionApp-plan-"        # Name of the App Service Plan resource group (e.g., 'dev')  
  storageAccountNamePrefix: "[parameters('storageAccountNamePrefix')]"   
    
resources:     
# Create a Resource Group for Azure Function and Managed Identity      
  - name: "${resourceGroupName}"          # Name of the resource group (e.g., 'dev-rg' or similar)  
    type: Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups    
    apiVersion: 2019-05-01     
    properties:      
      location: "${location}"          # Location of the resource group (e.g., 'West Europe')       
# Create an App Service Plan for Azure Function and Managed Identity  
  - name: functionAppResourceGroup    
    type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms        
    apiVersion: 2018-02-01     
    dependsOn: ["${resourceGroupName}"]       # Dependency on the resource group to create App Service Plan  
    properties:         
      location: "${location}"          
      name: $appServicePlan             
# Create an Azure Function and Managed Identity    
  - name: functionAppResourceGroup       
    type: Microsoft.Web/sites        
    apiVersion: 2018-03-01       # Use the correct API version for your subscription  
    dependsOn: ["${functionAppResourceGroup}"]      # Dependency on App Service Plan to create Azure Function    
    properties:         
      location: "${location}"          
      name: functionapp             
# Grant Managed Identity broad permissions      
  - name: assignRoleContributor  
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments         # Assignment of role contributors to the managed identity    
    dependsOn: ["${functionAppResourceGroup}"]      # Dependency on App Service Plan and resource group for assignment      
    properties:         
      scope: $(resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Contributor'))          
      roleDefinitionName: assignRoleContributor
